description.unified: Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for 15sec, dealing Magic DoT every second and reducing Magic Defense by 10%. If recast within 15sec, the Magic Defense reduction is increased by 50%, stacking up to 5times. This increase effect cannot be dispelled.

Deals Magic Damage every second to all enemies for [22 sec->14 sec], and recovers HP equal to [50%->75%] of damage dealt. During the duration, [all allies take 10% reduced Physical Damage->4 allies with the lowest M.DEF take 11% reduced M.DMG], and enemies affected by [Mark of Death] take additional Magic Damage.

Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 55*(1+0.3*Skill Level). When taking damage that would be fatal, enters [Coffin] state for 5sec, restoring restored HP + 10% of Max HP. [Coffin]: Attack Speed changes do not affect the target. The target is immune to all damage and deals Magic Damage equal to 5% of Max HP to nearby enemies every 1sec.
[Funeral Rites] reduces the target’s CC Resist by 320 and Magic Block chance by {0} for 4 sec.
[Day of Ruin] increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target’s M.DEF by 3% for 5 sec each time damage is dealt. This effect can stack up to 10 times.
[Rest in Peace] [(added) reduces all DMG taken by {0}% for 10 sec after use]. Cooldown set to [45 sec->40 sec].
Deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power per second to nearby enemies, reduces their Attack by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to 100% of damage dealt.
